hero.name: Vo Thien Hien
hero.title: Managing Partner · Apolo Lawyers
hero.tagline: Trusted legal counsel for businesses and individuals

sections.practiceAreasDescription: Deep expertise across multiple legal disciplines, serving clients with precision and care
sections.latestPublicationsDescription: Sharing legal knowledge and in-depth perspectives

practiceAreas.civilDesc: Advising and representing clients in contract disputes, damages claims, and property rights matters.
practiceAreas.landDesc: Resolving complex land disputes, real estate matters, and land use rights conflicts.
practiceAreas.familyDesc: Advising on divorce, child custody, asset division, and family-related legal matters.
practiceAreas.corporateDesc: Advising on formation, M&A, corporate governance, and foreign investment in Vietnam.
practiceAreas.laborDesc: Representing clients in labor disputes, employment contracts, and employee rights matters.
practiceAreas.commercialDesc: Representing clients in commercial litigation at courts and commercial arbitration proceedings.
practiceAreas.criminalDesc: Defending clients in criminal cases, protecting their legal rights and interests.

publications.title1: Key Changes in Vietnam's Enterprise Law 2024
publications.excerpt1: Analysis of notable amendments in the revised Enterprise Law and their impact on business operations.
publications.title2: Resolving Land Disputes: A Practical Guide
publications.excerpt2: A detailed guide on the land dispute resolution process from mediation to court litigation.
publications.title3: Guide to Investing in Vietnam for Foreign Investors
publications.excerpt3: An overview of the legal framework, investment incentives, and steps to establish a foreign-invested enterprise.

items.quote: When a supplier breached our distribution agreement, Attorney Vo Thien Hien guided us through arbitration with clarity and calm. He recovered nearly the full contract value in under eight months.
items.author: Raj Patel

items.quote: My divorce involved property in two countries and a shared business. Vo Thien Hien's team explained each step in English, worked closely with my foreign counsel, and protected my interests throughout.
items.author: David Chen

items.quote: I was buying my first apartment in Ho Chi Minh City and was worried about the paperwork. Vo Thien Hien reviewed the developer's contract, flagged two risky clauses, and negotiated them out before I signed.
items.author: Hannah Lindqvist

items.quote: After my father passed away, our family had inherited land in three provinces and no will. Vo Thien Hien patiently brought everyone to an agreement without a single court hearing.
items.author: Emily Tran

items.quote: Opening a foreign-owned restaurant in District 3 was more complicated than I expected. Vo Thien Hien handled the investment registration, lease review and employment contracts so I could focus on the kitchen.
items.author: Marco Vitale

cta.heading: Ready to discuss your legal matter?
